case_title: PATEL, N. R. vs. MALONSON, ROY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALONSON, ROY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 106 SIXTH ST #703, STAYED UNTIL SEP-15-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, PLF WAIVES DAMAGES IF DEF VACATES BY 15-SEPT-98 BUT MAY OBTAIN AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR $1693.56 IF DEF. FAILS TO VACATE.
